nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 森林
nodes.summary: 森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联402种鸟类，包括疣鼻棲鴨、Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan等402种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Dusky-capped flycatcher
nodes.summary: Dusky-capped flycatcher（Dusky-capped flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus tuberculifer），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于Várzea forest、森林、次生林，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Várzea forest
nodes.summary: Várzea forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、Spix's guan等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: tuberculifer primarily inhabits várzea and terra firme forest and the transitional forest between them

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: tuberculifer primarily inhabits várzea and terra firme forest and the transitional forest between them

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It also occurs in secondary forest, riparian forest, and plantations

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: There it occurs in evergreen, semideciduous, and deciduous montane forest where it typically prefers the canopy and edges. The other subspecies of the dusky-capped flycatcher, found from Panama south through Colombia and western Ecuador and Peru, inhabit landscapes that include tropical and subtropical evergreen and deciduous forest, riparian zones, secondary forest, and plantations
